title: Butchery: Alex's Mobs Addon
description: This mod add compatibility between Butchery and Alex's Mobs!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b56308fddc4c1c43b673ed3db1e8168376ea4b4b.png)

## **🔪What is Butchery Alexs Mobs Addon?**

Butchery Alex's Mobs Addon is a greatly requested addon for my main mod Butchery. This mod adds support for some for Alex's Mobs mods and allows them to be butchered for greater amounts of resources. The mod addon is currently in beta so has limited supported mobs and may contain bugs.

## **🐖Currently Supported Mobs**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
This is NOT the finished list, more will be added with further updates. 
- Bald Eagle
  
- Blobfish
  
- Caiman
  
- Capuchin
  
- Crow
  
- Emu

</details>

## **🤩Support Me**

Creating mods is taking me a lot of time and effort, if you'd like to support me and supply me with tasty italian fuel to continue with this mod and my others you can buy me a pizza by clicking the image above!

## **📜Credits**

Full credits for the mobs goes to Alex's Mobs and their amazing team.

## **🌍Required Mods**

This addon requires the following other mods:

Butchery - [https://modrinth.com/mod/butchery](https://modrinth.com/mod/butchery)

Alexs Mobs - [https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/butchery)
